query: SELECT pbs.project_id, p.name as project_name, pbs.scoring_dimension, pbs.score, LEFT(pbs.explanation, 80) as explanation FROM project_business_line_scores pbs JOIN projects p ON p.id = pbs.project_id ORDER BY pbs.project_id LIMIT 27;
